LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD TERMS OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT THAT DEFENDANT BREACHED, TO PLEAD FACTS THAT COULD TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION, TO PLEAD FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION OR OMISSIONS BY DEFENDANT OR FACTS SUFFICIENT TO MAKE THE MORTGAGE BROKER AN AGENT OF DEFENDANT FOR THE PURPOSES OF ATTRIBUTING ITS CONDUCT TO DEFENDANT AND TO PLEAD REASONABLE RELIANCE IN LIGHT OF THE DISCLOSURES IN THE NOTE PLAINTIFF SIGNED OF WHICH THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS AURORA BANK FSB (FORMERLY LEHMAN BROTHERS BANK, FSB) AND AURORA LOAN SERVICES DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS HAVE TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO STATE FRAUD-BASED CLAIMS AND TO INVOKE THE DELAYED DISCOVERY EXCEPTION TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS AURORA BANK FSB (formerly LEHMAN BROTHERS BANK, FSB) AND AURORA LOAN SERVICES DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Paige M. Hibbert, Esq. 916/971-8500 for pltfs & opposing parties (appearing via CourtCall); Brian S. Whittemore, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5591 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled. Defendants have ten days to answer. The first amended complaint alleges sufficient facts to state fraud-based claims and to invoke the delayed discovery exception to the statute of limitations. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order that tracks the tentative ruling. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Continued To Oct-05-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS AURORA LOAN SERVICES AND AURORA BANK FSB (FORMERLY LEHMAN BROTHERS BANK) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO 10/5/11 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN 9/27/11. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). COURTESY COPIES SHALL REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Reporter, Mitch Lyon, CSR # 6840 =301/EHG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT AURORA LOAN SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to plead terms of the written contract that defendant breached, to plead facts that could toll the statute of limitation, to plead fraudulent misrepresentation or omissions by defendant or facts sufficient to make the Mortgage Broker an agent of defendant for the purposes of attributing its conduct to defendant and to plead reasonable reliance in light of the disclosures in the note plaintiff signed of which the court takes judicial notice. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
